name: Front Plank
instructions:
1. Forearms on ground, body straight
2. Squeeze glutes and core
3. Hold position
4. Don't let hips sag
tips: Keep breathing. Draw belly button in.

name: Side Plank
instructions:
1. Lie on side, forearm on ground
2. Stack feet, lift hips
3. Body forms straight line
4. Hold, then switch sides
tips: Don't let hips drop. Stack shoulders.

name: Reverse Plank
instructions:
1. Sit with hands behind, fingers forward
2. Lift hips up, body straight
3. Squeeze glutes
4. Hold position
tips: Keep hips high. Engages posterior chain.

name: Crunch
instructions:
1. Lie on back, knees bent
2. Hands behind head
3. Curl shoulders off floor
4. Lower with control
tips: Don't pull on neck. Small controlled movement.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions:
1. Lie on back, hands behind head
2. Bring opposite elbow to knee
3. Alternate sides in pedaling motion
4. Keep shoulders off ground
tips: Slow and controlled. Feel the rotation.

name: Sit-Up
instructions:
1. Lie on back, knees bent
2. Cross arms on chest or behind head
3. Sit all the way up
4. Lower with control
tips: Anchor feet if needed. Full range of motion.

name: Leg Raise
instructions:
1. Lie on back, legs straight
2. Raise legs to vertical
3. Lower slowly, don't touch ground
4. Keep lower back pressed down
tips: Harder than it looks. Place hands under hips for support.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions:
1. Hang from bar, arms extended
2. Raise legs to parallel or higher
3. Lower with control
4. Minimize swinging
tips: Bend knees for easier variation. Straight legs for advanced.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
instructions:
1. Hang from bar
2. Bring knees to chest
3. Squeeze abs at top
4. Lower slowly
tips: Don't swing. Control the movement.

name: Russian Twist
instructions:
1. Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly
2. Hold weight at chest
3. Rotate torso side to side
4. Tap weight on each side
tips: Lift feet for harder variation. Control the rotation.

name: Dead Bug
instructions:
1. Lie on back, arms up, knees bent 90 degrees
2. Extend opposite arm and leg
3. Keep lower back pressed to floor
4. Return and alternate
tips: Fundamental core stability. Keep lower back flat.

name: Bird Dog
instructions:
1. On hands and knees
2. Extend opposite arm and leg
3. Hold for 2 seconds
4. Return and alternate
tips: Keep hips level. Great for spinal stability.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions:
1. Kneel with ab wheel in front
2. Roll forward extending arms
3. Go as far as you can control
4. Pull back using abs
tips: Start with small range. Progress to full extension.

name: Pallof Press
instructions:
1. Stand sideways to cable/band
2. Hold at chest
3. Press straight out
4. Resist rotation, return
tips: Anti-rotation exercise. Don't let body twist.

name: Toe Touch
instructions:
1. Lie on back, legs straight up
2. Reach hands to toes
3. Curl shoulders off ground
4. Lower with control
tips: Keep legs vertical. Short, controlled crunching motion.

name: Flutter Kick
instructions:
1. Lie on back, legs extended
2. Hands under hips
3. Alternately kick legs up and down
4. Keep legs straight
tips: Small, rapid movements. Keep lower back pressed down.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions:
1. Start in push-up position
2. Drive one knee to chest
3. Switch legs quickly
4. Keep hips level
tips: Faster for cardio, slower for core focus. Keep hips down.

name: V-Up
instructions:
1. Lie flat, arms overhead
2. Simultaneously raise legs and torso
3. Touch hands to toes at top
4. Lower everything together
tips: Full body crunch. Modify with bent knees if needed.

name: Hollow Body Hold
instructions:
1. Lie on back, arms overhead
2. Lift shoulders and legs off ground
3. Press lower back into floor
4. Hold position
tips: Gymnastic fundamental. Regression: bend knees or lower arms.

name: Superman
instructions:
1. Lie face down, arms extended
2. Simultaneously lift arms, chest, and legs
3. Squeeze lower back and glutes
4. Hold 2 seconds, lower
tips: Don't hyperextend neck. Look at the floor.

name: Plank Shoulder Tap
instructions:
1. Start in push-up position
2. Tap opposite shoulder with hand
3. Alternate sides
4. Minimize hip rotation
tips: Anti-rotation challenge. Wider feet makes it easier.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions:
1. Kneel facing cable, rope behind head
2. Crunch down toward floor
3. Squeeze abs at bottom
4. Return with control
tips: Hinge at waist, not hips. Great for progressive overload.

name: Dragon Flag
instructions:
1. Lie on bench, grip behind head
2. Raise entire body up on shoulders
3. Lower slowly keeping body straight
4. Don't let hips bend
tips: Bruce Lee's signature exercise. Extremely challenging.

name: Decline Sit-Up
instructions:
1. Hook feet on decline bench
2. Cross arms or hands behind head
3. Sit all the way up
4. Lower with control
tips: Increased range of motion. Hold plate for added resistance.

name: Copenhagen Plank
instructions:
1. Side plank position, top foot on bench
2. Bottom leg hanging
3. Lift hips creating straight line
4. Hold position
tips: Critical for groin injury prevention in soccer players.

name: Plank to Push-Up
instructions:
1. Start in forearm plank
2. Push up to hand one arm at a time
3. Lower back to forearms
4. Alternate leading arm
tips: Keep hips stable. Don't rock side to side.

name: Windshield Wiper
instructions:
1. Lie on back, legs vertical
2. Lower legs to one side
3. Return to center
4. Lower to other side
tips: Keep shoulders on ground. Bend knees for easier variation.

name: Suitcase Carry
instructions:
1. Hold heavy dumbbell in one hand
2. Stand tall, don't lean
3. Walk with control
4. Switch sides
tips: Anti-lateral flexion. Stay perfectly upright.

name: Plank With Leg Lift
instructions:
1. Start in forearm plank
2. Lift one leg 6 inches
3. Hold 2 seconds
4. Lower and alternate
tips: Don't rotate hips. Squeeze the glute of lifted leg.

name: 10m Sprint
instructions:
1. Set in sprint start position
2. Explode out of start
3. Drive knees high
4. Sprint through finish
tips: Focus on acceleration. First 3 steps are crucial.

name: 20m Sprint
instructions:
1. Explosive start
2. Transition from drive to upright
3. Maintain top speed
4. Sprint through finish
tips: Full recovery between sprints. Quality over quantity.

name: 40m Sprint
instructions:
1. Explosive acceleration phase
2. Transition to max velocity
3. Maintain top speed
4. Sprint through line
tips: Focus on smooth acceleration then top speed maintenance.

name: 100m Sprint
instructions:
1. Acceleration phase (0-30m)
2. Transition phase (30-60m)
3. Max velocity (60-80m)
4. Deceleration management (80-100m)
tips: Full recovery essential. Don't overstride at top speed.

name: Shuttle Run (5-10-5)
instructions:
1. Start at middle cone
2. Sprint 5 yards right, touch line
3. Sprint 10 yards left, touch line
4. Sprint 5 yards back to start
tips: Low center of gravity on turns. Plant and explode.

name: Tempo Run
instructions:
1. Run at 70-80% max speed
2. Maintain consistent pace
3. Focus on running form
4. Breathe rhythmically
tips: Builds aerobic speed endurance. Not a jog, not a sprint.

name: Hill Sprint
instructions:
1. Find moderate hill (5-10% grade)
2. Sprint up with high knee drive
3. Walk back down for recovery
4. Full effort each rep
tips: Builds explosive power. Reduces hamstring injury risk vs flat sprints.

name: Flying Sprint
instructions:
1. Build up to max speed over 20-30m
2. Maintain top speed for 20m
3. Focus on relaxed sprinting
4. Gradual deceleration
tips: Tests true top-end speed. Completely relaxed face and shoulders.

name: Interval Run (400m)
instructions:
1. Run 400m at 85-90% effort
2. Recover with slow jog or walk
3. Repeat for prescribed sets
4. Maintain pace each interval
tips: Classic speed endurance. Pacing is key — don't go out too fast.

name: Fartlek Run
instructions:
1. Jog at easy pace
2. Pick up speed to landmarks
3. Recover with easy jog
4. Vary intensity throughout
tips: Unstructured speed play. Fun and effective for building fitness.

name: Acceleration Drill
instructions:
1. Start in various positions (standing, lying, kneeling)
2. Explode to sprint on signal
3. Accelerate for 15-20m
4. Decelerate and walk back
tips: Vary starting positions. React to visual or audio cues.

name: Deceleration Drill
instructions:
1. Sprint 20m at max speed
2. Decelerate and stop within 5m zone
3. Lower center of gravity
4. Short choppy steps to stop
tips: Critical for injury prevention. Learn to brake efficiently.

name: Resisted Sprint (Band)
instructions:
1. Attach band around waist, partner holds
2. Sprint against resistance
3. Drive knees high
4. Maintain sprint mechanics
tips: Overloads acceleration phase. Don't let form break down.

name: A-Skip
instructions:
1. Skip with high knee drive
2. Dorsiflexed ankle
3. Snappy ground contact
4. Coordinated arm action
tips: Sprint drill fundamental. Focus on posture and rhythm.

name: B-Skip
instructions:
1. High knee drive like A-skip
2. Extend leg forward, then pull back
3. Active pawing motion
4. Coordinated arm swing
tips: Teaches active ground contact. Don't overstride.

name: High Knees
instructions:
1. Run in place with exaggerated knee lift
2. Drive knees to waist height
3. Fast arm action
4. Stay on balls of feet
tips: Quick feet. Pump arms aggressively.

name: Butt Kicks
instructions:
1. Jog while kicking heels to glutes
2. Quick turnover
3. Stay on balls of feet
4. Arms swing naturally
tips: Sprint drill for hamstring recovery speed. Quick, light contacts.

name: Agility Ladder In-Out
instructions:
1. Face ladder, step in with both feet
2. Step out with both feet
3. Move forward one square
4. Repeat through ladder
tips: Stay on balls of feet. Quick, light contacts.

name: Agility Ladder Icky Shuffle
instructions:
1. Start beside ladder
2. Step in-in-out pattern
3. Move laterally through ladder
4. Quick feet, stay low
tips: Most popular ladder drill. Keep center of gravity low.

name: Agility Ladder Lateral Run
instructions:
1. Stand sideways to ladder
2. Step through each square laterally
3. Two feet in each square
4. Face same direction both ways
tips: Don't cross feet. Stay on balls of feet.

name: Cone Drill (Square)
instructions:
1. Set 4 cones in 5m square
2. Sprint to first cone
3. Shuffle to second
4. Backpedal to third, sprint to start
tips: Sharp changes of direction. Plant outside foot on turns.

name: T-Test
instructions:
1. Sprint forward 10m to center cone
2. Shuffle left 5m, touch cone
3. Shuffle right 10m, touch cone
4. Shuffle left to center, backpedal to start
tips: Classic agility test. Stay low, don't cross feet on shuffle.

name: Pro Agility (5-10-5)
instructions:
1. Start at middle line in 3-point stance
2. Sprint 5 yards to one side
3. Sprint 10 yards to other side
4. Sprint 5 yards back through start
tips: Plant hard on direction changes. Low body position.

name: Zigzag Run
instructions:
1. Set cones in zigzag pattern
2. Sprint to each cone
3. Cut sharply at each cone
4. Accelerate between cones
tips: Plant outside foot, push off at angle. Stay low through cuts.

name: Hexagon Drill
instructions:
1. Stand in center of hexagon
2. Jump over each side and back to center
3. Go clockwise then counterclockwise
4. Quick two-foot jumps
tips: Develops reactive agility. Face same direction throughout.

name: Box Drill
instructions:
1. 4 cones in 10m square
2. Sprint forward
3. Side shuffle
4. Backpedal, side shuffle to start
tips: Mix up movement patterns. Change direction quickly.

name: Reactive Agility Drill
instructions:
1. Partner points direction
2. React and sprint to cone
3. Change direction on command
4. Return to start
tips: Trains decision-making under fatigue. Sport-specific reactivity.

name: Illinois Agility Test
instructions:
1. Start lying face down
2. Sprint to first cone
3. Weave through center cones
4. Sprint to finish
tips: Standard fitness test. Combines speed and agility.

name: Lateral Shuffle
instructions:
1. Athletic stance, knees bent
2. Push off trailing foot
3. Slide laterally
4. Stay low, feet never cross
tips: Keep feet apart. Stay in athletic position throughout.

name: Carioca
instructions:
1. Move laterally
2. Cross trailing foot in front
3. Step with lead foot
4. Cross behind, repeat
tips: Stay on balls of feet. Exaggerate hip rotation.

name: Backpedal to Sprint
instructions:
1. Backpedal 5m
2. On signal, turn and sprint 10m
3. Quick hip turn
4. Explode into sprint
tips: Drop hips on turn. Crucial for defensive sports movements.

name: Mirror Drill
instructions:
1. Face partner in athletic stance
2. Partner moves randomly
3. Mirror their movements
4. React as quickly as possible
tips: Stay low, weight on balls of feet. Develops reaction time.

name: Star Drill
instructions:
1. Place 5 cones in star pattern
2. Start at center
3. Sprint to each outer cone and back
4. Cover all 5 points
tips: Multi-directional agility. Great for soccer players.
